data.title: Kaito’s ‘yap-to-earn’ airdrop doxes and ranks crypto influencers
data.description:
Kaito launched an airdrop to users of Coinbase’s Base layer 2, and crypto influencers voluntarily doxxed their wallets to participate.
The post Kaito’s ‘yap-to-earn’ airdrop doxes and ranks crypto influencers appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/kaitos-yap-to-earn-airdrop-doxes-and-ranks-crypto-influencers/

data.title: S&P Global says regulatory gap hampers U.S. stablecoins adoption
data.description:
S&P Global, an American financial research and analytics firm, revealed that gaps in regulation remained a stumbling block for stablecoins adoption. S&P noted that a regulatory framework could increase stablecoin adoption in the U.S. and help close the gap with Europe, where the markets in crypto-assets regulation came into force in mid-2024.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sp-global-u-s-stablecoins-adoption/

data.title: SEC Announces Creation of New Cyber and Emerging Technologies Unit (CETU) To Complement Crypto Task Force
data.description:
Laura D’Allaird has been appointed chief of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission’s new crypto watchdog, said the SEC in a new announcement. The SEC says the new Cyber and Emerging Technologies Unit (CETU) will replace the old Crypto Assets and Cyber Unit. CETU says it will “combat misconduct” relating to securities in the areas […]
The post SEC Announces Creation of New Cyber and...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/20/sec-announces-creation-of-new-cyber-and-emerging-technologies-unit-cetu-to-complement-crypto-task-force/

data.title: ECB eyes blockchain-based payment settlement layer
data.description:
The European Central Bank (ECB) is working to establish a blockchain-based payment system that will allow financial institutions to settle transactions using central bank money, Bloomberg News reported on Feb. 20. ECB executive board member Piero Cipollone said the project is a step toward improving financial market efficiency through innovation. Phased approach The project will […]
The post...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ecb-eyes-blockchain-based-payment-settlement-layer/

data.title: Argentina’s president Javier Milei arrives in Washington amid crypto scandal
data.description:
Argentina’s president Javier Milei touched down in Washington, D.C., on Thursday, arriving in the middle of the biggest political firestorm of his presidency. Javier’s visit—scheduled weeks in advance—was originally about securing an International Monetary Fund (IMF) deal and strengthening ties with Donald Trump’s administration. But now, Javier is walking into a different battle: explaining...
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/argentinas-president-javier-milei-arrives-in-washington-amid-crypto-scandal/

data.title: Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows stall, but analysts say CME BTC basis hints at price reversal
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/spot-bitcoin-etf-inflows-stall-but-cme-btc-basis-hints-at-price-reversal?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
